mechanics.excerpt: In truth, though militarism is central to the Clan way of Iife Clan warriors form less than one percent of the population Those deemed unsuitable for warrior life , or who flunk out Of warrior training_ are assigned t0 the four civilian castes_ The work of these laborers merchants scien tists and technicians allows Clan society to function_ By Inner Sphere standards, Clan civilians are second-class citizens.
